determinism_boundary: core+pack-formulas = pure stdlib (now injected); hash excludes now/*_at meta; domain feeds (satellite/price/forecast) = meta-layer outside Routestra boundary (produces the candidate/telemetry)

design_notes.lineage: HELIX (resource-routing cluster) -> Routestra (deterministic resource-routing/siting platform). Independent git repo under D:/HELIX/Routestra.
design_notes.family: -stra platform family: Attestra(attest) + Clearstra(clear) + Routestra(route). Shared severity algebra (valid/thin/breach == compliant/restricted/violation).
design_notes.thesis: One deterministic routing kernel (score -> route -> bound -> verify + routing ledger) + N domain packs. Each HELIX routing project projects via score/bounds.
design_notes.reference_pack: ComputePowerPack (SkyGrid parity for score/route/verify); ThermalCascadePack (ThermalCascadeBound parity for bound)

verify.skygrid_parity: SKYGRID PARITY OK — route() selects locB score=90.0, identical to real SkyGrid.plan_compute_roaming
verify.verdict_aligned: to_attestra_verdict maps compliant/restricted/violation -> valid/thin/breach (-stra family algebra)
